title: Cookies and data processing
intro: This page explains what Walrus Notes stores, why it is needed, and what you agree to when you continue using the site.

cookies.title: What cookies we use
items: Session cookies to keep you signed in.
Preference cookies to remember language and theme.
Consent cookies to remember that you have seen this notice.

data.title: Personal data processing
items: Registration data such as email, username, and password hash are used to create and maintain your account.
Workspace and note data are processed to provide collaborative note-taking features.
We do not use your data for advertising and do not share it with third parties except where required to run the service.

rights.title: What you can do
items: Review, change, or delete your account data from the app settings when available.
Clear browser cookies at any time to reset local consent state.
Contact the project owners if you want more details about storage or processing.

footer: By continuing to use Walrus Notes, you acknowledge this information and agree to the described processing.
